title: RETURNING VETERANS PROJECT - 211info
text: RETURNING VETERANS PROJECT RETURNING VETERANS PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential mental and physical health services through volunteer health providers. Traditional and non-traditional services may be available. Eligibility: Veterans, Service Members, including National Guard and Reserve personnel, and Military Family members (including spouses/partners, children, parents, grandparents, and siblings directly impacted by military service). Hours: Varies Email (503) 954-2259 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 954-2259 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to locate a provider. Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Alternative Medicine * Veterans Family Counseling * Veterans Marriage and Relationships Counseling * Veterans Physical Therapy * Veterans Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Veterans Veteran Reintegration Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
